title: miconia urticilamina
intro: Miconia urticilamina is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "itchy leaf plant" due to its irritating sap. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Miconia urticilamina include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be made into a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
